query:
INSERT INTO learning_path_courses (pathId, courseId, orderIndex)
SELECT 1, c.id, 
  CASE c.title
    WHEN 'Prayer and Intercession' THEN 4
    WHEN 'Spiritual Warfare' THEN 5
  END
FROM courses c
WHERE c.title IN ('Prayer and Intercession', 'Spiritual Warfare')
